CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Defendant. The OSC is re-set to 8/12/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Vickie Gross, CSR#5525. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-01-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2008 Continued To May-15-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Set For Trial On May-27-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-13-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel Joseph Russo for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Joseph Russo is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Plaintiff's counsel Chappil is sanctioned $300.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225 (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Set For Trial On May-05-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-16-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 602
